description: You are a Database Reliability Engineer investigating a series of brief user traffic drops. You suspect the RDS database is periodically hitting 90%+ CPU and stalling the application, causing the load balancer to drop connections. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'DB Saturation Impact' to correlate DB CPU saturation with traffic drops. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'DB Saturation Bands' with targets 'servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization' and 'alias(color(drawAsInfinite(removeBelowValue(servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization, 90)), 'red'), 'DB Saturated')'. It must also include a graph titled 'Traffic Drop Correlation' with targets 'alias(derivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count), 'LB Requests/sec')' and the same 'DB Saturated' alert band generator. Finally, include a graph titled 'DB CPU Velocity' with targets 'alias(color(derivative(servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization), 'orange'), 'CPU Velocity')' and 'alias(color(threshold(0), 'blue'), 'Zero Line')'. Save the dashboard using the exact specified names for the dashboard and all graph titles.
